versions.version_description: These chords were derived from previous other versions. These are not the exact chords from the song, but sounds great without the second guitar (like in the song). Have fun with it :).

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Complete and well-aligned chord sheet for the whole song / suggestions for playable voicings / F#m7-5 in the verses.
